> message("*** Tricky use cases related to globals ...")
*** Tricky use cases related to globals ...

> for (cores in 1:availCores) {
+   ## Speed up CRAN checks: Skip on CRAN Windows 32-bit
+   if (!fullTest && isWin32) next
+   
+   message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ...", cores))
+   options(mc.cores = cores)
+ 
+   message("availableCores(): ", availableCores())
+ 
+   message("- Local variables with the same name as globals ...")
+ 
+   for (strategy in supportedStrategies(cores)) {
+     message(sprintf("- plan('%s') ...", strategy))
+     plan(strategy)
+ 
+     methods <- c("conservative", "ordered")
+     for (method in methods) {
+       options(future.globals.method = method)
+       message(sprintf("Method for identifying globals: '%s' ...", method))
+ 
+       a <- 3
+ 
+       yTruth <- local({
+         b <- a
+         a <- 2
+         a * b
+       })
+ 
+       y %<-% {
+         b <- a
+         a <- 2
+         a * b
+       }
+ 
+       rm(list = "a")
+ 
+       res <- try(y, silent = TRUE)
+       if (method == "conservative" && strategy %in% c("multisession", "cluster")) {
+         str(list(res = res))
+         stopifnot(inherits(res, "try-error"))
+       } else {
+         message(sprintf("y = %g", y))
+         stopifnot(identical(y, yTruth))
+       }
+ 
+ 
+       ## Same with forced lazy evaluation
+       a <- 3
+ 
+       y %<-% {
+         b <- a
+         a <- 2
+         a * b
+       } %lazy% TRUE
+ 
+       rm(list = "a")
+ 
+       res <- try(y, silent = TRUE)
+       if (method == "conservative") {
+         str(list(res = res))
+         stopifnot(inherits(res, "try-error"))
+       } else {
+         message(sprintf("y = %g", y))
+         stopifnot(identical(y, yTruth))
+       }
+ 
+ 
+       res <- listenv()
+       a <- 1
+       for (ii in 1:3) {
+         res[[ii]] %<-% {
+           b <- a * ii
+           a <- 0
+           b
+         }
+       }
+       rm(list = "a")
+ 
+       res <- try(unlist(res), silent = TRUE)
+       if (method == "conservative" && strategy %in% c("multisession", "cluster")) {
+         str(list(res = res))
+         stopifnot(inherits(res, "try-error"))
+       } else {
+         print(res)
+         stopifnot(all(res == 1:3))
+       }
+ 
+ 
+       ## Same with forced lazy evaluation
+       res <- listenv()
+       a <- 1
+       for (ii in 1:3) {
+         res[[ii]] %<-% {
+           b <- a * ii
+           a <- 0
+           b
+         } %lazy% TRUE
+       }
+       rm(list = "a")
+ 
+       res <- try(unlist(res), silent = TRUE)
+       if (method == "conservative") {
+         str(list(res = res))
+         stopifnot(inherits(res, "try-error"))
+       } else {
+         print(res)
+         stopifnot(all(res == 1:3))
+       }
+ 
+ 
+       ## Assert that `a` is resolved and turned into a constant future
+       ## at the moment when future `b` is created.
+       ## Requires options(future.globals.resolve = TRUE).
+       a <- future(1)
+       b <- future(value(a) + 1)
+       rm(list = "a")
+       message(sprintf("value(b) = %g", value(b)))
+       stopifnot(value(b) == 2)
+ 
+       a <- future(1)
+       b <- future(value(a) + 1, lazy = TRUE)
+       rm(list = "a")
+       message(sprintf("value(b) = %g", value(b)))
+       stopifnot(value(b) == 2)
+ 
+       a <- future(1, lazy = TRUE)
+       b <- future(value(a) + 1)
+       rm(list = "a")
+       message(sprintf("value(b) = %g", value(b)))
+       stopifnot(value(b) == 2)
+ 
+       a <- future(1, lazy = TRUE)
+       b <- future(value(a) + 1, lazy = TRUE)
+       rm(list = "a")
+       message(sprintf("value(b) = %g", value(b)))
+       stopifnot(value(b) == 2)
+ 
+ 
+       ## BUG FIX: In future (<= 1.0.0) a global 'pkg' would be
+       ## overwritten by the name of the last package attached
+       ## by the future.
+       pkg <- "foo"
+       f <- sequential({ pkg })
+       v <- value(f)
+       message(sprintf("value(f) = %s", sQuote(v)))
+       stopifnot(pkg == "foo", v == "foo")
+       
+       message(sprintf("Method for identifying globals: '%s' ... DONE", method))
+     }
+ 
+     ## BUG FIX: In globals (<= 0.10.3) a global 'x' in LHS of an assignment
+     ## would be missed.
+     options(future.globals.method = "ordered")
+ 
+     ## A local
+     x <- 1
+     f <- future({ x <- 0; x <- x + 1; x })
+     v <- value(f)
+     message(sprintf("value(f) = %s", sQuote(v)))
+     stopifnot(v == 1)
+     
+     ## A global
+     x <- 1
+     f <- future({ x <- x + 1; x })
+     v <- value(f)
+     message(sprintf("value(f) = %s", sQuote(v)))
+     stopifnot(v == 2)
+ 
+     ## A global
+     x <- function() TRUE
+     f <- future({ x <- x(); x })
+     v <- value(f)
+     message(sprintf("value(f) = %s", sQuote(v)))
+     stopifnot(v == TRUE)
+   } ## for (strategy ...)
+ 
+   message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ... DONE", cores))
+ } ## for (cores ...)

[09:38:19.181]                               next

[09:38:19.181]                             break

[09:38:19.205]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.205]                         if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.205]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.205]                       }

[09:38:19.205]                               next
[09:38:19.205]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:19.205]                               next
[09:38:19.205]                             invokeRestart(restart)

[09:38:19.205]                             break
[09:38:19.205]                           }
[09:38:19.205]                         }
[09:38:19.205]                       }

[09:38:19.205]                     }

[09:38:19.336]                       }
[09:38:19.336]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:19.336]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:19.336]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:19.336]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:19.336]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:19.336]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:19.336]                             name <- restart$name
[09:38:19.336]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:19.336]                               next
[09:38:19.336]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:19.336]                               next
[09:38:19.336]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:19.336]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:19.336]                             break
[09:38:19.336]                           }
[09:38:19.336]                         }
[09:38:19.336]                       }
[09:38:19.336]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:38:19.336]                     }
[09:38:19.336]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:38:19.336]                   }
[09:38:19.336]                 }
[09:38:19.336]             }

[09:38:19.359]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:38:19.359]                   {
[09:38:19.359]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:19.359]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:19.359]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:19.359]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:19.359]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:19.359]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.359]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.359]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.359]                     }
[09:38:19.359]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:19.359]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.359]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.359]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.359]                     }
[09:38:19.359]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:19.359]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:19.359]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:19.359]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:19.359]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:19.359]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:19.359]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:19.359]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:19.359]                             next
[09:38:19.359]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:19.359]                             next
[09:38:19.359]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:19.359]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:19.359]                           break
[09:38:19.359]                         }
[09:38:19.359]                       }
[09:38:19.359]                     }
[09:38:19.359]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:19.359]                   }
[09:38:19.359]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:19.359]                 })

[09:38:19.498]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:38:19.498]                   {
[09:38:19.498]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:19.498]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:19.498]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:19.498]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:19.498]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:19.498]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.498]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.498]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.498]                     }
[09:38:19.498]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:19.498]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.498]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.498]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.498]                     }
[09:38:19.498]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:19.498]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:19.498]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:19.498]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:19.498]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:19.498]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:19.498]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:19.498]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:19.498]                             next
[09:38:19.498]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:19.498]                             next
[09:38:19.498]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:19.498]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:19.498]                           break
[09:38:19.498]                         }
[09:38:19.498]                       }
[09:38:19.498]                     }
[09:38:19.498]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:19.498]                   }
[09:38:19.498]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:19.498]                 })
[09:38:19.498]             }))
[09:38:19.498]             future::FutureResult(value = ...future.value$value, 
[09:38:19.498]                 visible = ...future.value$visible, rng = !identical(base::globalenv()$.Random.seed, 
[09:38:19.498]                   ...future.rng), globalenv = if (FALSE) 
[09:38:19.498]                   list(added = base::setdiff(base::names(base::.GlobalEnv), 
[09:38:19.498]                     ...future.globalenv.names))
[09:38:19.498]                 else NULL, started = ...future.startTime, version = "1.8")
[09:38:19.498]         }, condition = base::local({
[09:38:19.498]             c <- base::c
[09:38:19.498]             inherits <- base::inherits

[09:38:19.739]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:19.739]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:19.739]                           break

[09:38:19.838]                       muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:19.838]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:19.838]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.838]                         if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.838]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:19.838]                       }
[09:38:19.838]                       else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:19.838]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.838]                         if (muffled) 
[09:38:19.838]                           invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:19.838]                       }
[09:38:19.838]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:19.838]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:19.838]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:19.838]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:19.838]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:19.838]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:19.838]                             name <- restart$name
[09:38:19.838]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:19.838]                               next
[09:38:19.838]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:19.838]                               next
[09:38:19.838]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:19.838]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:19.838]                             break
[09:38:19.838]                           }
[09:38:19.838]                         }
[09:38:19.838]                       }
[09:38:19.838]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:38:19.838]                     }
[09:38:19.838]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:38:19.838]                   }
[09:38:19.838]                 }

[09:38:20.149]                   {
[09:38:20.149]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:20.149]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:20.149]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:20.149]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:20.149]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:20.149]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.149]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.149]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.149]                     }
[09:38:20.149]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:20.149]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.149]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.149]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.149]                     }
[09:38:20.149]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:20.149]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:20.149]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:20.149]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:20.149]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:20.149]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:20.149]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:20.149]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:20.149]                             next
[09:38:20.149]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:20.149]                             next
[09:38:20.149]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:20.149]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:20.149]                           break
[09:38:20.149]                         }
[09:38:20.149]                       }
[09:38:20.149]                     }
[09:38:20.149]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:20.149]                   }
[09:38:20.149]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:20.149]                 })
[09:38:20.149]             }))

[09:38:20.269]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:38:20.269]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:38:20.269]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:38:20.269]                   envs[common]]
[09:38:20.269]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:38:20.269]                 args <- list()
[09:38:20.269]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:20.269]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.269]                     next
[09:38:20.269]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:38:20.269]                 }
[09:38:20.269]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:38:20.269]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:20.269]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.269]                     next
[09:38:20.269]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:38:20.269]                 }
[09:38:20.269]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:38:20.269]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:20.269]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:20.269]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.269]                     next
[09:38:20.269]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:38:20.269]                 }
[09:38:20.269]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:38:20.269]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:38:20.269]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:38:20.269]             }

[09:38:20.333]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:38:20.333]                   {
[09:38:20.333]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:20.333]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:20.333]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:20.333]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:20.333]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:20.333]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.333]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.333]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.333]                     }
[09:38:20.333]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:20.333]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.333]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.333]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.333]                     }
[09:38:20.333]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {

[09:38:20.400]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:38:20.400]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:38:20.400]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:38:20.400]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:38:20.400]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:38:20.400]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:38:20.400]                   envs[common]]
[09:38:20.400]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:38:20.400]                 args <- list()
[09:38:20.400]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:20.400]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:38:20.400]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:20.400]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.400]                     next
[09:38:20.400]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:38:20.400]                 }
[09:38:20.400]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)

[09:38:20.400]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:38:20.400]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.400]                     next
[09:38:20.400]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:38:20.400]                 }
[09:38:20.400]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:38:20.400]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:20.400]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:38:20.400]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:20.400]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:20.400]                     next

[09:38:20.400]                 }

[09:38:20.435]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:38:20.435]                   {
[09:38:20.435]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:20.435]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:20.435]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:20.435]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:20.435]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:20.435]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.435]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.435]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.435]                     }
[09:38:20.435]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:20.435]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.435]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.435]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.435]                     }
[09:38:20.435]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:20.435]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:20.435]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:20.435]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:20.435]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:20.435]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:20.435]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:20.435]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:20.435]                             next
[09:38:20.435]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:20.435]                             next
[09:38:20.435]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:20.435]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:20.435]                           break
[09:38:20.435]                         }
[09:38:20.435]                       }
[09:38:20.435]                     }
[09:38:20.435]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:20.435]                   }
[09:38:20.435]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:20.435]                 })
[09:38:20.435]             }))

[09:38:20.551]                   {
[09:38:20.551]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:20.551]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:20.551]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:20.551]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:20.551]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:20.551]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.551]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.551]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.551]                     }
[09:38:20.551]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:20.551]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.551]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.551]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.551]                     }
[09:38:20.551]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:20.551]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:20.551]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:20.551]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:20.551]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:20.551]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:20.551]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:20.551]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:20.551]                             next
[09:38:20.551]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:20.551]                             next
[09:38:20.551]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:20.551]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:20.551]                           break
[09:38:20.551]                         }
[09:38:20.551]                       }
[09:38:20.551]                     }
[09:38:20.551]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:20.551]                   }
[09:38:20.551]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:20.551]                 })

[09:38:20.703]                   muffleCondition <- function (cond, pattern = "^muffle") 
[09:38:20.703]                   {
[09:38:20.703]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:38:20.703]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:38:20.703]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:38:20.703]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:38:20.703]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:38:20.703]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.703]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.703]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:38:20.703]                     }
[09:38:20.703]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:38:20.703]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.703]                       if (muffled) 
[09:38:20.703]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:38:20.703]                     }
[09:38:20.703]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:38:20.703]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:38:20.703]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:38:20.703]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:38:20.703]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:38:20.703]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:38:20.703]                           name <- restart$name
[09:38:20.703]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:38:20.703]                             next
[09:38:20.703]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:38:20.703]                             next
[09:38:20.703]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:38:20.703]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:38:20.703]                           break
[09:38:20.703]                         }
[09:38:20.703]                       }
[09:38:20.703]                     }
[09:38:20.703]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:38:20.703]                   }
[09:38:20.703]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:38:20.703]                 })
[09:38:20.703]             }))

[09:38:22.908]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:38:22.908]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:38:22.908]                   envs[common]]
[09:38:22.908]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:38:22.908]                 args <- list()
[09:38:22.908]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:22.908]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:22.908]                     next
[09:38:22.908]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:38:22.908]                 }
[09:38:22.908]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:38:22.908]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:22.908]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:22.908]                     next
[09:38:22.908]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:38:22.908]                 }
[09:38:22.908]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:38:22.908]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:38:22.908]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:38:22.908]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:38:22.908]                     next
[09:38:22.908]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:38:22.908]                 }
[09:38:22.908]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:38:22.908]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:38:22.908]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:38:22.908]             }
[09:38:22.908]             else {
[09:38:22.908]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:38:22.908]             }
